name: Tidy Boys
description: The '''Tidy Boys''' are a UK-based hard dance music duo formed of Andy Pickles and Amadeus Mozart.  They are known for creating the [[Tidy Trax]] record label, and their [[hard house]] DJ and production work.   Pickles and Mozart are also known as '''Hyperlogic''', the '''Handbaggers''', and '''Untidy Dubs'''.
